title: cenchrus sichuanensis
intro: Cenchrus sichuanensis, also known as Sichuan Broom Grass or Chinese Broom Grass, is a type of plant native to the Sichuan province in China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Cenchrus sichuanensis is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its aerial parts are used in herbal preparations to treat various ailments.
